title: Obsidian Chest
description: Make Block Entities(Chest, Barrels, ...) immune to Explosives!
body:
# What is it?
This is a simple mod: Make block entity(Chest, Barrels and etc) and signs immune to explosives!

[GIF](https://imgur.com/a/3cbpIn8)


## Usage:
/gamerule enableObsidianChest (true|false)

Enjoy!
